description: Style NoteThis T-shirt from puma comes equipped with moisture management technology to help you keep going strong in the gym and on the field while not having to worry about sweating. Stylish, this T-shirt also does well for the fashion conscious dresser.Product DetailsRed T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, mesh panelling around the under arm region for easy sweat absorption and branding on the chest Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash warm Tumble dry low Use cold ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
